holdings.infoBox: SHE is an equity ETF with a total of 233 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 5.39%, Broadcom at 4.25%, NVIDIA at 4.13%, Microsoft at 4.04%, and Netflix at 3.83%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI USA Gender Diversity ETF (SHE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Gender Diversity Select index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-sized companies promoting gender diversity whilst exhibiting a relatively high proportion of women throughout all levels of their organizations. SHE was launched on Mar 7, 2016 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: MSCI USA Gender Diversity Select Index

data.title: Diversity ETFs in 2021: What to watch
data.text: MSCI's Linda-Eling Lee and Main Management's Kim Arthur flag a key theme to watch in ESG heading into the new year. With CNBC's Bob Pisani.
